protein_name: Actin-depolymerizing protein. Severs actin filaments (F-actin) and binds to actin monomers (G-actin). Acts in a pH-independent manner. Belongs to the actin-binding proteins ADF family. Widely distributed in various tissues. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: actin cytoskeleton; cortical actin cytoskeleton; cytoplasm; glutamatergic synapse; postsynapse; presynapse
raw_fields.Molecular Function: actin binding; actin filament binding; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament depolymerization; actin filament fragmentation; actin filament severing; actin polymerization or depolymerization
